Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when preceded by SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that lead to SW-EIC Accept compared to those leading to SW-EIC Reject

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be followed by a final editorial decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where at least one reviewer agreed (SW-Reviewer Agreed occurred) versus cases with no reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed event in a case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed to the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in multi-reviewer scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants containing repeated reviewer assignment cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to begin after the final required SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include revision rounds (e.g., RW-Initial Reviewer Selection) versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
